Uses of Class
neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion.MechanisticCorrosionModel

Packages that use MechanisticCorrosionModel
Package
Description
neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion
 

  • Uses of MechanisticCorrosionModel in neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion

    Methods in neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion that return MechanisticCorrosionModel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.evaluate()
    Runs the full mechanistic calculation: NORSOK kinetic baseline → mass-transfer-limited rate → mixed control → Langmuir inhibition.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.setFlow(double velocityMs, double diameterM, double densityKgM3, double viscosityPas)
    Sets pipe and flow geometry.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.setGasComposition(double co2, double h2s)
    Sets CO2 and H2S mole fractions in the gas phase.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.setInhibitor(LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm inhibitor, double doseMgL)
    Sets the inhibitor model and dose.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.setTemperatureCelsius(double tC)
    Sets temperature in Celsius.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.setTotalPressureBara(double p)
    Sets total system pressure in bara.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    MechanisticCorrosionModel.setWaterChemistry(double pH, double bicarbMgL, double ionicStrength)
    Sets aqueous-phase chemistry.
